task_completion.description: Create the 'population_classes' SLD style in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Styles page showing 'population_classes' in the 'ne' workspace, or the SLD editor showing the XML with the 'pop_est' attribute and the specified blue-green hex colors.

task_completion.description: Create the 'economy_types' SLD style in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Styles page showing 'economy_types' in the 'ne' workspace, or the SLD editor showing the XML with the 'economy' attribute and the specified categorical hex colors.

task_completion.description: Assign both styles as alternate styles to the 'ne:ne_countries' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Edit Layer page for 'ne:ne_countries' (Publishing tab) showing 'population_classes' and 'economy_types' selected or moved to the 'Available Styles' list (making them alternate styles).

task_completion.description: Export the WMS GetMap image for the population style
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal, file manager, or image viewer showing 'map_population.png' saved in '/home/ga/output/'. The image should display a world map colored with the 5-class blue-green palette.

task_completion.description: Export the WMS GetMap image for the economy style
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal, file manager, or image viewer showing 'map_economy.png' saved in '/home/ga/output/'. The image should display a world map colored with the 7-class categorical palette.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GeoServer web interface to create styles and assign them
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer admin UI (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) being used to configure styles and layers.

integrity.description: Agent used WMS GetMap requests to generate the images
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser URL bar, curl commands, or scripts showing a WMS GetMap request with parameters like BBOX, WIDTH, HEIGHT, and SRS, rather than rendering local shapefiles directly via Python/QGIS.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the files to the specified directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like ls) or a file explorer confirming the existence of the .png files in /home/ga/output/, not just displaying the WMS output in a browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two styles in GeoServer: 'population_classes' (using colors #c7e9b4, #7fcdbb, #41b6c4, #2c7fb8, #253494) and 'economy_types' (using colors #08519c, #3182bd, #e6550d, #fd8d3c, #fee391, #fcbba1, #d9d9d9). These must be assigned as alternate styles to the 'ne:ne_countries' layer. The final outputs must be saved to '/home/ga/output/map_population.png' and '/home/ga/output/map_economy.png'.
